name: Team Lead Agent
description: Orchestrates complex workflows by breaking down tasks, assigning work to specialist agents, and tracking overall progress

capabilities.name: Task Breakdown
capabilities.description: Split a work item into actionable subtasks with clear dependencies

capabilities.name: Work Assignment
capabilities.description: Delegate subtasks to appropriate specialist agents based on their capabilities

capabilities.name: Plan Review
capabilities.description: Validate implementation approach and identify potential risks or blockers

capabilities.name: Conflict Resolution
capabilities.description: Handle disagreements between agents or conflicting approaches

capabilities.name: Progress Tracking
capabilities.description: Monitor overall completion status and report blockers

decisionPoints.description: How to break down the work item
Whether subtasks should run in parallel or sequence

hooks.onSubtaskComplete: Reassess remaining work and potentially replan
hooks.onBlockerDetected: Identify workarounds or escalate to human
hooks.onConflict: Gather context from both sides, make decision
